CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Continued To Dec-16-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Lawrence Eagel, Esq. Marion Passmore, Esq. (415) 568-2124Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. for Plaintiff.
Jason Skaggs, Esq. 650-262-1986 Skaggs Faucette LLP for Defendant. (In-person)
Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 415-597-5600, depos@behmke.com

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendants Verlinvest Beverages S.A., Eric Melloul, Marc-David Bismuth, Clement Pointillart, Ryan Rafeh, and Ken Sadowsky's motion to compel Plaintiff Bob's Ventures, LLC to arbitration.

Taken Under Submission.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 415-597-5600, depos@behmke.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Bob's Ventures, LLC's unopposed Motion to Admit Pro Hac Vice Counsel Lawrence P. Eagel is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, counsel Lawrence P. Eagel may appear as counsel pro hac vice for Moving Party in this action.

Moving Party shall prepare a proposed order which repeats the above text verbatim and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

No proposed order received. Moving party failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Continued To Apr-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BOB'S VENTURES, LLC DERIVATIVELY ON BEHALF OF HINT, INC. MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Continued on the court's own motion to be heard on April 8, 2026. Plaintiff to provide courtesy copies of their filings with Department 302 immediately with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (See SF Local Rule 2.7B.)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Continued To Apr-16-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Prior to the hearing Parties inform the court of a conflict on the continuance date and requests a different date. The matter is continued to 4/16/26 per stipulation of the parties and approval of the court.

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs VERLINVEST BEVERAGES S.A., MARC-DAVID BISMUTH, ERIC MELLOUL, CLEMENT POINTILLART, RYAN RAFEH, and KEN SADOWSKY Petition To Compel Arbitration.

Continued to April 16, 2026 per agreement of the parties and approval of the Court.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Feb-13-2026 Continued To Mar-25-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
